_comment: 21 hooks for clip_004 — round-robin slice of the 144-hook library from clip_001.
hooks:
pov the only thing playing
in my mind after literally one drink

If I can still walk we're not done yet,
go take a water break old man
can you handle a girl like me?

sending you another version
if you say 'pls'

if youre going to stare,
do it properly.
pov: your type just followed you back

only men will understand
what i want when i say
"round and sideways"

what i hear when people say
you can't fall in love with an older guy

If you manage to read
this sentence backwards
it means that:

yssup ym tae nac uoy os
ecalp ruoy ot emoc ot
evah I

Skip if you dont like me...

(pause if you love hidden surprises)

Pretty privilege is saying the meanest things
to men because u don't want them
and they like u even more

if you didn't know my name/age
what would you think it was?

the ones who scroll past
always come back

I googled "how to be less attractive"
and got zero results

would you take me on a proper date
or just invite me over?

comment your height.
I'll start: I'm 5'4 and I love tall men

my ex called me T.M.I.
— Too Much Irresistible

hooks._note: 4-segment: 3 ways a guy asks me out

segments.text:
3 different ways a guy
would ask me out

Smooth:
"Let me take you out this week."

Nervous:
"hh... wanna hang out...
... yeah... nevermind..."

Playful:
"So... when are we going on our date?"
